commands.name: kick
commands.description: Kicks a member from the server.

commands.name: ban
commands.description: Bans a member from the server.

commands.name: mute
commands.description: Mutes a member in text channels.

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Deletes a specified number of messages.

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Displays your server profile and rank.

commands.name: weather
commands.description: Shows the weather for a specified location.
